---
title: "debug_engine.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/debug_engine.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.92
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 4.73
overall_score: 4.30
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `DebugEngine`
- `execute`
